variants.title: HiFi Filter SAC 105004 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAC 105004 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAC 105004 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 267.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 113.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 102.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 304.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 270.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson C105004 Air Filter, Primary Duralite | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAC 105004
variants.option1Value: Donaldson C105004 Air Filter, Primary Duralite | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAC 105004
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson DuraLite™ Air Cleaners? Rugged, lightweight, self-supporting, and completely disposable combination air cleaner and filter. • Function well under severe pulsation conditions, particularly two- and three-cylinder engines. • Vibration-resistant media is secured into molded housings of rugged ABS plastic—so they don’t fall apart as other designs might. • Easy to install, durable, and reliable. • Completely disposable — acceptable for normal trash pick-up (DuraLite should not be incinerated).

variants.title: Fleetguard AH1196 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAC 105004
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AH1196 Air Intake Systems | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAC 105004
variants.description: With over 1,500 different air filtration products, from clamps to air housings to advanced air filters, Fleetguard® provides peace of mind for your air filtration needs. Our Fleetguard AH1196 air housing is part of the heavy-duty air filtration line, covering your sophisticated air intake system requirements.
